---
title: "Catching the drift: EEG microstate dynamics resemble time‑on‑task changes in sustained attention and mind wandering"

pub-authors:
  - Tsukahara
  - Zanesco
  - Schwartzman
  - Denkova
  - Jha

pub-year: 2026
date: 2026-05-01
venue: "Cognitive Neuroscience"
pub-type: Empirical Article
pub-status: Published

pdf: "/"
data:
code:
doi: ""
link: ""

abstract: "Paper Abstract"

listing-page: false
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>.quarto-title-meta { display: none !important; } .quarto-title-block .abstract { display: none !important; }</style>
---

{{< include ../../../assets/_meta-publication.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_download-buttons.qmd >}}

{{< include ../../../assets/_pdf-viewer.qmd >}}
